Решение:

```bash
sudo addgroup labgroup
sudo adduser --disabled-password --gecos "" labuser
sudo usermod -aG labgroup labuser
```

Решение:

```bash
sudo mkdir /home/lab-share
sudo chown labuser:labgroup /home/lab-share
sudo chmod a+r /home/lab-share
sudo -u labuser touch /home/lab-share/new.txt
```
